title: neolitsea javanica
intro: Neolitsea javanica, also known as Java neolitsea or Javan neolitsea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neolitsea javanica include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Neolitsea javanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
